Hedera helix, also known as English ivy, is a plant that belongs to the family Araliaceae, characterized by its evergreen, climbing habit and glossy leaves. The plant is rich in various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce stress, and boost the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Hedera helix include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
